analysis.macro_backdrop: Fed funds 3.50-3.75% hold. CPI Mar 2026: +3.3% YoY (elevated). FOMC Apr 28-29 with 99% hold probability. No BTC ETF SEC decisions expected in next 24h. Geopolitical: US-Iran tensions persist.
analysis.technical_note: Resistance at $76K-$77.5K. Support at $75K (100-day MA). 200-day MA at ~$87K indicates overall bearish structure vs long-term average. RSI ~62 (neutral). Negative funding rate = potential short squeeze catalyst.
analysis.regime_rationale: Mixed signals: institutional buying is bullish but sentiment remains fearful, $76K resistance firm, CPI elevated constrains Fed easing. Confidence 0.40 is below 0.50 bot threshold - macro filter will NOT be applied this cycle.
